center.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
center.summary: Albertine Rift montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联44种鸟类，包括Barred long-tailed cuckoo、白枕鸽、Albertine owlet等44种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Abyssinian owl prefers open grasslands or moorlands with oak or cedar forests, and it is found in mountain valleys and gorges at elevations of up to 2,900 meters (9,514 feet) a.s.l. It lives in the Albertine Rift montane forests, Democratic Republic of Congo, Ethiopia, central Kenya, and Western Uganda. This species is classified as least concern by IUCN due to its very large range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Glaucidium albertinum |article-number=e.T22689310A208604278 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-1.RLTS.T22689310A208604278.en}} | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | taxon = Glaucidium albertinum | authority = Prigogine, 1983 | synonyms = }} The Albertine owlet (Glaucidium albertinum) or Prigogine's owlet, is a small species of small owl in the family Strigidae, native to the Albertine Rift montane forests

birds.evidence: This species is only known from the Albertine Rift in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo, where it is found in montane forest between 2000 and 3300 m in elevation. Sight records of this species exist from Rwanda and Burundi, but these lack documentation and have yet to be confirmed

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: doi : 10.14344/IOC.ML.10.2. | subdivision = * Pogoniulus coryphaea angolensis - (Boulton, 1931) * Pogoniulus coryphaea coryphaea - (Reichenow, 1892) * Pogoniulus coryphaea hildamariae - (Sclater, WL, 1938) | synonyms = }} The western tinkerbird (Pogoniulus coryphaea) is a species of bird in the family Lybiidae native to Central Africa, where it has been recorded at altitudes from . It has a threefold area of presence : the Angolan montane forest–grassland mosaic, the Western High Plateau and the Albertine Rift montane forests
